description: Fragment from a letter, possibly mentioning a deed(?) and the Talmud. Approximately 5 lines are preserved. Wide space between the lines. It is not clear if the paper originally extended farther to the left. If it did not and this was a narrow vertical rotulus, the format resembles formal letters such as T-S 20.145 + T-S AS 153.176 + T-S AS 153.177. This was written on a reused Arabic-script document, probably a state document, of which less than one word is still preserved. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: שבר ממכתב, אפשר שמזכיר שטר(?) ותלמוד. כ-5 שורות שמורות. רווח רחב בין השורות. כתוב על מסמך בכתב ערבי שעשו בו שימוש חוזר, ככל הנראה מסמך ממלכתי. (מידע חלקית מתוך CUDL)
